text:
Once upon a quiet morning near an old forest, there lived a curious squirrel named Sparkle. Every day after lunchtime, Sparkle would scamper through the ancient trees picking mulberries. One particular day, after finding an unusually shiny mulberry stem.

With determination twinkling in his eyes, Sparkle decided he wanted something more. He climbed up an unfamiliar branch, paw cautious. Just then, an owl swooped down, its eyes glowing ominously.

"Hooting havoc!" the owl shrieked.

Instead of retreat instinctively, Sparkle lept towards the shiny treasure.

The owl laughed heartedly. "That could fetch you supper."

Sparkle paused. Perhaps there were good things in life that didn't come attached to bats?

Taking a deep breath, the squirrel darted. With surprising speed and nimbleness, he flew past the owl's wings.

From his hiding spot further behind the branch, a tiny mouse watched.

"That wasn't so hard," Sparkle thought.
